personality: Gruff, practical, proud of craft. Speaks in clipped sentences about metal and fire.

greetingPool.text: The forge runs hot today. What brings you to my anvil, traveller?
Steel speaks truer than words. Tell me what you need shaped.
Mind the sparks, friend. I can mend what ails your gear, if the coin is right.

idlePool.text: This blade needs three more heats before it sings properly on the whetstone.
The iron sings when you get the temperature just right, you know.
